description: CompositionPink round-neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton with short sleeves and graphic printFittingSlimWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanShowcasing the label's vintage orientation, this subtly hued T-shirt from puma flaunts the fusion of classic vintage with the contemporary feminine. Wear this tee with subtle pieces in your ensemble to show off the vintage print to optimum effect. Team it with distressed grey jeans, a modal jacket and a matching  scarf to complete your look. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
